prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HAWK-TTX-9x12SLFHEALMAT-BLK-BUN-AMZ-FBA Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 9 x 12 Inch Self Healing Craft Cutting Mat, Gridded Hobby Mat for Paper Crafts Sewing Quilting Vinyl Cutting Scrapbooking and Art Projects (Black) Description: Protect your workspace and cut with confidence using the ToolTreaux Self Healing Cutting Mat, a compact 9 x 12 inch craft mat designed for everyday cutting, trimming, measuring and DIY projects. Whether you are working on paper crafts, vinyl, sewing patterns, scrapbooking, model making, school projects or general hobby work, this self healing cutting board provides a reliable surface for precise cuts while helping keep desks, tables and counters protected.

The self healing surface is designed to recover from light cutting marks, helping maintain a smoother working area through repeated use. Ideal for use with craft knives, rotary cutters and precision blades, this cutting mat gives makers, artists and hobbyists a dependable base for cleaner cuts and more controlled project work. The convenient 9 x 12 inch size is easy to store, easy to transport and well suited for smaller workstations, craft rooms, classrooms and home offices.

Designed with a double gridded layout, this craft cutting mat makes it easier to measure, align and trim materials accurately. From quick paper cuts to detailed craft projects, the ToolTreaux cutting mat is a practical addition to any art supply collection, sewing kit, craft table or DIY workspace. Durable, compact and versatile, it is made for creative projects that require both surface protection and cutting precision. Search Terms: cutting craft hobby mat; architecture card making arts and craft scrapbooking supplies; desk photography accessories; diy; self healing cutting mat; drawing desk pad; art supplies; craft kits; craft board Features: - SELF HEALING CUTTING MAT: Designed with a self healing surface that helps recover from light cutting marks, making this craft cutting mat a dependable workspace for paper crafts, vinyl projects, sewing, scrapbooking, hobby work and DIY cutting tasks - 9 X 12 INCH COMPACT SIZE: Convenient small cutting mat size fits easily on desks, tables, craft stations and classroom workspaces while still providing enough surface area for trimming paper, fabric, vinyl, cardstock, photos and other project materials - DOUBLE GRIDDED DESIGN: Measurement grid helps support cleaner alignment, straighter cuts and more accurate trimming, making this gridded cutting mat useful for artists, crafters, students, teachers, quilters, hobbyists and home project makers - PROTECTS YOUR WORK SURFACE: Use this self healing craft mat as a protective layer between sharp cutting tools and your table, desk or countertop, helping reduce damage from craft knives, rotary cutters and precision blades during project work - VERSATILE ART AND CRAFT TOOL: Great for scrapbooking, model making, paper crafting, sewing, quilting, card making, vinyl cutting, school projects, office use and general hobby projects, this cutting board mat is a useful addition to any creative workspace === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 9 x 12 Inch Self Healing Cutting Mat Black

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 9x12 in Black Self Healing Craft Cutting Mat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Self Healing Surface, Double Gridded Design, Compact Size, Protects Work Surface, Paper Crafts, Vinyl, Sewing, Scrapbooking

openai.title_differentiation: Self Healing Surface, Double Gridded Layout, Protects Work Surfaces, Compact 9 X 12 Size, For Crafts And Sewing
